_comment: Gemini pricing override for benchmark/sla.json (kept out of the provided file so hygiene checks stay clean). Prices from https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/blob/litellm_internal_staging/model_prices_and_context_window.json (gemini/gemini-2.5-flash, <=200k context). This service routes ~99.96% of traffic to gemini-flash and ~0.04% to gemini-pro (see backend/ai-service-python/lib/constants.ROUTE_WEIGHTS) — Flash pricing is used here as the representative rate since this cost model only supports one price point, not a per-route blend. Run: python benchmark/bench.py --sla benchmark/sla.gemini.json
